medical_reports.title: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Hemoglobin: 14.5 g/dL. WBC: 7000/mcL. RBC: 4.8 million/mcL. Platelets: 250,000/mcL. All parameters within normal ranges. No sign of infection or anemia.

medical_reports.title: Chest X-Ray
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Lungs are clear. No active pulmonary infiltrates. Heart size is normal. Bony thorax is intact.

medical_reports.title: Asthma Action Plan
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Patient prescribed Albuterol inhaler. Use 2 puffs every 4-6 hours as needed for shortness of breath.

medical_reports.title: Cardiology Report
medical_reports.raw_text_content: ECG shows normal sinus rhythm. Patient complains of occasional palpitations. Recommended 24-hour Holter monitor for further evaluation.

medical_reports.title: Dermatology Biopsy
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Benign nevus excised from right arm. No atypia or malignancy identified.

medical_reports.title: Emergency Room Admission
medical_reports.raw_text_content: CRITICAL: Patient arrived via EMS with severe chest pain. Diagnosed with acute myocardial infarction. Transferred to cath lab immediately.

medical_reports.title: Endocrinology Visit
medical_reports.raw_text_content: HbA1c is 7.2%. Adjustment made to Metformin dosage. Patient advised on dietary restrictions and regular exercise.

medical_reports.title: MRI Report
medical_reports.raw_text_content: MRI of right knee shows a partial tear of the ACL and meniscus damage. Surgical consultation recommended.

medical_reports.title: General Physical
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Patient in good health. Blood pressure 110/70. Recommended annual flu shot.

medical_reports.title: Ophthalmology Review
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Vision 20/20 in both eyes. Intraocular pressure normal. No signs of glaucoma or cataracts.

medical_reports.title: Urinalysis
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Clear appearance. Negative for glucose, ketones, and protein. Normal specific gravity.

medical_reports.title: Post-Op Followup
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Incision site healing well. Sutures removed. Clear to resume light activities.

medical_reports.title: Neurology Initial Evaluation
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Patient reports frequent migraines. Prescribed Sumatriptan for acute attacks. Advised to keep a headache diary.

medical_reports.title: Allergy Test
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Severe allergic reaction to peanuts and tree nuts identified. EpiPen prescribed. Avoidance mandatory.

medical_reports.title: Thyroid Panel
medical_reports.raw_text_content: TSH elevated at 6.5 mIU/L. T4 slightly low. Diagnosed with mild hypothyroidism. Starting Levothyroxine 50mcg.

medical_reports.title: Gastroenterology Scope
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Esophagogastroduodenoscopy performed. Mild gastritis noted. No ulcers or malignancy.

medical_reports.title: Pediatric Checkup
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Growth parameters normal. Immunizations up to date. Reassuring development.

medical_reports.title: Orthopedic Follow-up
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Fractured radius healing well based on repeat X-ray. Cast to be removed in 2 weeks. Start physiotherapy.

medical_reports.title: Psychiatry Assessment
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Patient reporting ongoing generalized anxiety. Cognitive behavioral therapy recommended along with current SSRI regimen.

medical_reports.title: Triage Note - Urgent Care
medical_reports.raw_text_content: URGENT: Patient presents with high fever, neck stiffness, and photophobia. Suspect meningitis. Initiating broad-spectrum antibiotics and preparing for lumbar puncture.

medical_reports.title: Annual Blood Panel
medical_reports.raw_text_content: Cholesterol levels slightly elevated (LDL 135 mg/dL). Advised low-fat diet and exercise. All other results unremarkable.
